meta.title: Advocate Ravi Chaniyara | Revenue & Land Legal Services in Gujarat
meta.description: Trusted legal guidance for land disputes, revenue matters, mutation entries, property documentation and government approvals across Gujarat.

hero.headline: Expert Advocate for Revenue & Land Legal Services
hero.subheading: Providing trusted legal guidance for land disputes, revenue matters, mutation entries, property documentation, government approvals, and legal consultation across Gujarat.

about.title: Two Decades of Trust in Revenue & Land Law
about.intro: Advocate Ravi Chaniyara has spent over a decade guiding families, farmers, and businesses through complex revenue and land matters across Gujarat — from mutation entries at the Talati office to appeals before the Deputy Collector.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To make revenue and land law accessible, transparent, and fair for every citizen, regardless of the complexity of their case.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be Gujarat's most trusted name in revenue legal consultancy, known for integrity, clarity, and results.

qualifications.title: Qualifications
items: Enrolled with Bar Council of Gujarat
Member, Gujarat High Court Advocates' Association

timeline.text: Enrolled as an Advocate and began practice in Civil & Revenue Law
Opened independent chambers focused on land and revenue matters
Crossed 250 successfully resolved mutation and title cases
Recognised for consistent success in Collector & Mamlatdar court representations
Serving 1000+ clients across Gujarat with a dedicated legal team

items.name: Kiran Patel
items.text: Resolved my mutation entry issue within weeks after it had been pending for years. Extremely professional and transparent throughout.

items.name: Meera Joshi
items.text: Excellent guidance on our land conversion case. Every step was explained clearly and the follow-up with the Collector's office was smooth.

items.name: Ashok Desai
items.text: Handled our family's land dispute with patience and skill. Highly recommend for anyone facing revenue matters in Gujarat.

items.name: Priya Chauhan
items.text: Very knowledgeable about RTS and title clearance procedures. Made a complicated process feel simple and stress-free.

items.q: What documents are required for a mutation entry?
items.a: Typically the sale deed, 7/12 extract, 8-A form, identity proof, and any relevant court orders are required. We help you compile the complete document set.

items.q: How long does a land dispute case usually take?
items.a: Timelines vary by complexity, but straightforward cases are often resolved within a few months, while contested matters may take longer through the appropriate forum.

items.q: Can you help with property registration?
items.a: Yes, we provide complete guidance through registration, stamp duty calculation, and document verification.
Initial consultations are affordably priced and discussed transparently before any engagement begins.

items.q: Do you handle cases outside your city?
items.a: Yes, we represent clients across Gujarat, including matters before Mamlatdar, Deputy Collector, and Collector offices in various districts.

items.q: How do I book a consultation?
items.a: You can call, WhatsApp, or fill out the contact form on this website, and our team will get back to you promptly.
